subcodes.first_line: This is a Remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath cast away what he possessed and taken hold of that which hath been sent down from God, the Lord of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن نبذ ما عنده و اخذ ما نزل من لدی الله رب العالمین فلما
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
